paper_title: MILP-Based Automatic Search Algorithms for Differential and Linear Trails for Speck
stress_points: modular addition under xor differential analysis

input_normalization.notes: Bundle exists for the current wave-1 ARX case.

algorithm_description.notes: Curated algorithm description exists and already exposes add_mod semantic hooks and rolling schedule metadata.

structural_ir.notes: Curated structural IR exists for the 9-round Speck32/64 checkpoint.

downstream_status.notes: Frontend is in place, but modular-add local semantics are still missing, so execution remains blocked honestly.

next_priority: Add grounded ARX modular-add rule packs so the existing frontend artifacts can descend into model instantiation.
known_gaps: No local semantics for arx_add_mod_xor_differential yet.
No model instantiation or execution-backed lane yet.
Current downstream blocker is semantic, not frontend structure.
notes: P3 is the key ARX stress case: frontend mostly exists, but semantics and backend support do not.
